problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
hypothesis: Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation may resolve What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
